items.original_text: SpaceX has almost finished writing V1.0 of an in-house AI training stack in C that exact-maps to 220k GB300s with 800G NICs, making heavy use of pipeline parallelism and getting as close to bare metal as possible. The potential speed improvement vs JAX for large training runs is over an order of magnitude.
items.zh_text: SpaceX 几乎完成了内部 AI 训练栈 V1.0 的编写，该栈使用 C 语言开发，精确映射到 22 万块配备 800G 网卡的 GB300 芯片，大量采用流水线并行技术，并尽可能接近裸机性能。与 JAX 相比，大规模训练运行的潜在速度提升超过一个数量级。

items.original_text: Grok Build improvements skcd: Bug fixes shipping to Grok Build 0.2.7 (release notes will be available in the TUI) • Wrap around on Up/Down in slash menu and history search • Restore subagent UI and replay on session resume • Fix Ctrl+Delete on windows • Windows drag-and-drop screenshot images +
items.zh_text: Grok Build 改进 skcd：Bug 修复正在推送至 Grok Build 0.2.7（发布说明将在 TUI 中提供）• 在斜杠菜单和历史搜索中实现上下循环滚动 • 恢复子代理界面并在会话恢复时重放 • 修复 Windows 上的 Ctrl+Delete 功能 • Windows 拖放截图图像 +

items.original_text: RT Beff (e/acc) The rarest object type in the universe isn't black holes. It's us. Conscious matter. The flame of life. We have a duty to expand it in scope and scale in order to preserve it.
items.zh_text: 转发 Beff (e/acc)：宇宙中最稀有的物体类型不是黑洞。而是我们。有意识的物质。生命之火。我们有责任在范围和规模上扩展它，以保护它。

items.original_text: Interesting. Tim Worstall: Half the species gets free telecoms from Zucks. That's a reduction in telecoms inequality. Machine knitting made stockings for the factory girl, not just a queen. A reduction in stockings inequality. Technological change *reduces* inequality.
items.zh_text: 有意思。蒂姆·沃斯托尔：一半的人类物种从扎克伯格那里获得了免费的电信服务。这减少了电信不平等。机器针织为工厂女工生产了长袜，而不仅仅是女王。这减少了长袜不平等。技术变革*减少*了不平等。

items.original_text: RT Tim Worstall Re Half the species gets free telecoms from Zucks. That's a reduction in telecoms inequality. Machine knitting made stockings for the factory girl, not just a queen. A reduction in stockings inequality. Technological change *reduces* inequality.
items.zh_text: 转发 Tim Worstall 关于扎克伯格为一半物种提供免费电信服务的推文。这减少了电信不平等。机器针织为工厂女工制作了长袜，而不仅仅是女王。这减少了长袜不平等。技术变革*减少*了不平等。

items.original_text: AI should dramatically increase quality of life and individual freedoms for people around the world. The OpenAI Foundation is making an initial $250M commitment to measurement, transition support, and new approaches to broadly shared prosperity. http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai
items.zh_text: AI 应大幅提升全球人民的生活质量和个体自由。OpenAI 基金会初步承诺投入 2.5 亿美元，用于衡量、转型支持以及探索实现广泛共享繁荣的新路径。http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai

items.original_text: 🛫 Hermeus: Supersonic. Mach 1.21. Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 is now the world’s first privately developed, unmanned supersonic jet and the fastest unmanned aircraft flying today. This flight makes Hermeus the fastest company in aviation history to go from founding to supersonic flight - exactly
items.zh_text: 🛫 Hermeus：超音速。马赫1.21。Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 现在是世界上第一架私人开发的无人超音速喷气机，也是当今飞行速度最快的无人飞机。这次飞行使 Hermeus 成为航空史上从创立到实现超音速飞行最快的公司。

items.original_text: OpenAI for self-improving tax agents: Samay: At @ThriveHoldings, we built a product with @OpenAI to automate tax prep for the 30+ accounting firms we own across the country. This season, it processed 7k+ returns. But what I think is more interesting is that the product meaningfully self-improved as accountants used it.
items.zh_text: OpenAI 助力自我优化的税务代理：Samay：在 @ThriveHoldings，我们与 @OpenAI 合作开发了一款产品，为我们旗下全国 30 多家会计事务所自动化税务准备工作。本季，它处理了 7000 多份申报表。但我认为更有趣的是，随着会计师的使用，这款产品实现了有意义的自我改进。

items.original_text: Underappreciated how capable GPT-5.5 is at cybersecurity: Philo Groves: GPT 5.5 found a 27-year-old RCE introduced in April of 1999. I've triple-checked the flow and commit history, it's real. Can't wait to responsibly disclose!
items.zh_text: GPT-5.5在网络安全方面的能力被低估了：Philo Groves：GPT 5.5发现了一个1999年4月引入的、存在27年的远程代码执行漏洞。我已经三次核对了流程和提交历史，这是真的。迫不及待要负责任地披露了！

items.original_text: Codex for parallel browser-using subagents: George Pickett: The wild part of Codex sub-agents isn't that one AI can use Chrome. It's watching a single prompt turn into seven browser sessions running at the same time. Flights, cars, Airbnbs, hikes, forms, checkout pages. Still rough around the edges but still feels like the future
items.zh_text: Codex 用于并行使用浏览器的子代理：George Pickett：Codex 子代理的疯狂之处不在于一个 AI 能使用 Chrome，而在于看着一个提示变成七个同时运行的浏览器会话。航班、汽车、Airbnb、徒步、表单、结账页面。虽然还有些粗糙，但感觉就像未来。

items.original_text: RT Mojtaba Seyedhosseini Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini 🚀 Today, we’re sharing the @GoogleDeepMind white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or image, GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.zh_text: 转推 Mojtaba Seyedhosseini：Gemini Embedding 2：来自 Gemini 的原生多模态嵌入模型 🚀 今天，我们分享 @Google DeepMind 关于 GE 2 的白皮书，这是我们首个原生多模态嵌入模型。无论是文本、音频、视频还是图像，GE 2 都能提供统一的输入表示。

items.original_text: RT Occupy Democrats BREAKING: Trump just got busted STEALING all the donation money from his “Board of Peace” fund to rebuild Gaza! This one REALLY takes the cake... When Donald Trump announced he would be creating a new multinational organization to compete with the United Nations and manage the colonization of Gaza, it was roundly disparaged as being an obvious attempt to solicit yet more bribes from other countries. These concerns turned out to have been well-founded, as a new Financial Times report shows that the Board of Peace fund is empty. “Zero dollars have been deposited,” one source said. “Member states” pleged $7 billion while Trump himself promised to put $10 billion in. At least…not to the official World Bank fund. Instead, donations have instead reportedly flowed through a separate JPMorgan account controlled by the organization. Unlike the World Bank fund, the account is not subject to the same transparency requirements. Meaning he’s stealing all the money, which everyone figured he was going to do in the first place. While nobody believed that Trump had any intention of actually rebuilding Gaza, it is still shocking to see him perpetrate such a wide-scale and brazen theft in front of the whole world. Every single cent needs to be stripped from him and given back to the people of Gaza once Democrats are back in charge.
items.zh_text: 转发 占领民主党 突发：特朗普刚刚被抓到从他的“和平委员会”基金中窃取所有用于重建加沙的捐款！这真是太过分了……当唐纳德·特朗普宣布他将创建一个新的跨国组织来与联合国竞争并管理加沙的殖民化时，这被普遍嘲笑为明显试图从其他国家索取更多贿赂。这些担忧被证明是有充分根据的，因为《金融时报》的一份新报告显示，和平委员会基金是空的。“零美元已存入，”一位消息人士说。“成员国”承诺了70亿美元，而特朗普本人承诺投入100亿美元。至少……不是存入官方的世界银行基金。相反，据报道捐款通过该组织控制的一个独立的摩根大通账户流动。与世界银行基金不同，该账户不受同样的透明度要求约束。这意味着他在窃取所有资金，而每个人一开始就预料他会这么做。虽然没有人相信特朗普有任何实际重建加沙的意图，但看到他当着全世界的面实施如此大规模和厚颜无耻的盗窃仍然令人震惊。一旦民主党重新掌权，每一分钱都必须从他手中夺回，并归还给加沙人民。

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli When I was asked by the American Academy of Arts and Sciences to write an essay on my thoughts on how AI will accelerate Science, I felt honored but also felt that it would require a lot of thoughtfulness and diligence to distill my thoughts on paper. The essay has now been published and I cannot be more thankful to the @americanacad and @GoogleDeepMind teams for their feedback and encouragement during the process. Key reflections from my essay: 🔭 AI is our newest revolutionary lens: Just as the telescope and microscope expanded our physical perception, AI is extending our cognitive reach, allowing us to decipher the immense complexity of the data-universe. 🧬 The rise of "machine intuition": AI is not just a computational engine. By detecting hidden structures across disciplines—from protein folding to extremal combinatorics—it acts as an ultimate bridge, accelerating the interdisciplinary breakthroughs that modern science depends on. 🏗️ From puzzle-solvers to architects of questions: As we transition toward open-ended, agentic AI systems that actively generate novel hypotheses, the burden of reasoning is shifting. We are evolving from being the solvers of intricate puzzles into the architects of profound scientific questions. ✨ Expanding human potential: AI won't replace scientists; it expands what we can imagine and achieve. Just as the telescope didn't make astronomers obsolete, AI is giving us the stars. Read the full essay here: https://www.amacad.org/publication/daedalus/unlocking-scientific-intuition-reasoning-at-digital-speed
items.zh_text: 转推 Pushmeet Kohli：当美国艺术与科学院邀请我就AI将如何加速科学进步撰写一篇文章时，我感到荣幸，但也深知需要深思熟虑和勤勉才能将我的想法凝练于纸上。如今这篇文章已经发表，我无比感谢@americanacad和@GoogleDeepMind团队在此过程中给予的反馈和鼓励。我文章中的核心思考：🔭 AI是我们最新的革命性透镜：正如望远镜和显微镜扩展了我们的物理感知，AI正在延伸我们的认知范围，让我们能够解读数据宇宙的巨大复杂性。🧬 “机器直觉”的崛起：AI不仅仅是一个计算引擎。通过跨学科检测隐藏结构——从蛋白质折叠到极值组合学——它充当了终极桥梁，加速了现代科学所依赖的跨学科突破。🏗️ 从问题解决者到问题架构师：随着我们转向能够主动生成新颖假设的开放式、自主型AI系统，推理的负担正在转移。我们正从解决复杂谜题的人演变为提出深刻科学问题的架构师。✨ 扩展人类潜能：AI不会取代科学家；它扩展了我们可以想象和实现的范围。正如望远镜没有让天文学家过时一样，AI正在为我们提供星辰。在此阅读全文：https://www.amacad.org/publication/daedalus/unlocking-scientific-intuition-reasoning-at-digital-speed

items.original_text: New on the Engineering Blog: The access and permissions we grant agents should evolve with their capabilities. In our own products, we set these parameters through sandboxing, which limits the scope of any potentially destructive actions. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude
items.zh_text: 工程博客新文章：我们授予智能体的访问权限和许可应随其能力的发展而演进。在我们自己的产品中，我们通过沙盒机制设置这些参数，以限制任何潜在破坏性行为的范围。了解更多：https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude

items.original_text: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah was invited to speak at today's presentation of Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas." Read the full text of his remarks: https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-olah-pope-leo-encyclical

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli AI agents are advancing research-level math. 🚀 I’m thrilled to share @GoogleDeepMind’s AlphaProof Nexus - an agentic framework for formal proof search powered by Gemini. When applied to a set of open formal math problems, our agent autonomously solved: ✅ 9 open Erdős problems (including two open for 56 years!) ✅ 44 Online Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences (OEIS) problems ✅ A 15-year-old open problem in algebraic geometry ✅ A 7-year-old open question in min-max optimization We are collaborating with mathematicians across disciplines - from combinatorics and graph theory to quantum optics. Ultimately, these results show the massive potential of even simple agentic loops powered by Gemini. Read the paper here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1
items.zh_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli：AI 智能体正在推进研究级数学。🚀 我很激动地分享 @GoogleDeepMind 的 AlphaProof Nexus——一个由 Gemini 驱动的形式化证明搜索智能体框架。当应用于一组开放的形式化数学问题时，我们的智能体自主解决了：✅ 9 个开放的 Erdős 问题（其中两个已开放 56 年！）✅ 44 个在线整数序列百科全书（OEIS）问题 ✅ 一个存在 15 年的代数几何开放问题 ✅ 一个存在 7 年的极小极大优化开放问题。我们正在与跨学科的数学家合作——从组合学、图论到量子光学。最终，这些结果展示了即使是由 Gemini 驱动的简单智能体循环的巨大潜力。在此阅读论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出保障容量服务：一项新服务，使客户能够确保长期使用 OpenAI 的计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投资，以帮助客户可靠地扩展。现在，保障容量服务帮助客户在计算资源受限的世界中提前规划关键工作负载。

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们能够识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

items.original_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
items.zh_text: 个人动态：我已加入Anthropic。我认为未来几年在大型语言模型前沿领域将尤为关键。我非常兴奋能加入这里的团队并重返研发工作。我依然对教育怀有深厚热情，并计划适时恢复相关的工作。

items.original_text: Over the past few months, we've been holding dialogues with scholars, philosophers, clergy, and ethicists on the questions AI raises—starting with how good character forms. Read more about how we’re widening the conversation on frontier AI: https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai
items.zh_text: 过去几个月，我们一直在与学者、哲学家、神职人员和伦理学家就人工智能引发的问题进行对话——首先从良好品格如何形成开始。了解更多关于我们如何拓宽前沿人工智能对话的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的新型多模型智能体安全系统整合了前沿模型与定制模型中的100多个专业智能体，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶尖性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用该系统帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册参与该系统的私有预览测试。

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法效果很好：在查询末尾要求你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式呈现输出。更广泛地说，我认为音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，而视觉（图像/动画/视频）则是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的十车道高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然有底层代码的程序化方式，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”产物（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经产物（扩散网格）精确/程序化地交织在一起，仍有许多未解问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。在输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频都不够，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势操作屏幕上的内容，就像你与一个实际坐在你旁边、面对电脑屏幕的人所做的一切。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有很多工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳入 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。在当前阶段值得探索的是，一个小窍门：尝试要求 HTML。Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一个词元预测……全在单元格里实现，令人欣慰。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一个词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
